genre_preference.value: action, horror, martial arts, sci-fi, drama
evidence: "It's Godzilla against Mechagodzilla… what more do you need to know? It's awesome !!!"
"This is a great haunted/possessed place movie. I've seen quite a few and I am a discriminating horror cinema fan."
"If you enjoy this genre, then you will love this movie which is lookin' good thanks to Blue Underground."
"This is a thinking man's action movie."
"This is old-school wild wire-fu mystical violent cornball Kung Fu entertainment that is about as good as it gets."
"The action was pretty good and the ladies were pretty pretty."
"The acting, cinematography, sound, special effects, story, etc. are all excellent."
"The direction, editing and cinematography are amazing."
"If you are a fan of sadist insane murderer movies of the type where the entire film is the action of the murderer and his victims..."
"If you are a fan of the great writing of Frank Herbert, you will be gravely disappointed."
"The musical score and cinematography are brilliant."
"The use of color, and shadow are masterful."
"I know that I am experiencing a great horror film when I need to take a rest period at some point and then return to it."

summary: The user has a strong preference for action-packed and horror films, particularly enjoying martial arts and sci-fi genres. They value high production quality and emotional impact in their viewing experiences, often favoring fast-paced narratives with engaging visuals.
